feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Accelerator Hub
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Accelerator Hub Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can One Domain Model be used without Master Data Integration Service?
entry.content:
Hello,

For replication of master data we are trying out another approach where in we call the remote service/API directly without any middleware, thus eliminating the use of Master Data Integration Service. In this scenario can we make use of the One Domain Model without MDI Service?

Kind regards,

Shreya

entry.title: Is grant type client credentials supported for S/4HANA API OAuth?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am using OAuth 2.0 to consume S/4HANA cloud API.

In some examples, the grant type is SAML2 bearer assertion, I am wondering if grant type client credential works as well. I've tried but ended up with an error message saying unknow client. Nor I see any document about this configuration. Anyone may help here?

Regards,
Eric

entry.title: CSRF Token for API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV via OAUTH
entry.content:
Hi

I am calling the API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV to POST attachments via OAUTH

The API for POST of attachments requires a CSRF Token but it seems I am not able to request it using OAUTH - only Basic Authentication will return it in the x-csrf-token response header.

Why can't I use OAUTH for both?

entry.title: How to obtain S4HC OAUTH2 Token
entry.content:
Hi

via POSTMAN I can obtain my OAUTH2.0 Token for my S4HC public cloud system using the "Wizard" Authorization tab - Configure New Token.  

But how can I do this without using the power of that button ?   that is - can I mimic the steps myself ? i.e. I want a 3rd party application to call our APIs and I want them to do it via OAUTH.

entry.title: API_SALES_ORDER retuning empty values for sales order items during POST operation
entry.content:
Hello Experts

We are using SAP standard API https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_SALES_ORDER_SRV_0001/path/post_A_SalesOrder

for Sales order creation. While making POST call to create Sales order along with Sales order items the Sales order is getting created successfully along with items. However in the response Payload the items section is returned as blank and we expect the line items details that got created. Please let me know how to get the line items data as well in the response Payload during POST call.

Current response received for items:

    "to_Item" : {
      "results" : [

 

      ]

}

Regards,

Abdul Hakim

entry.title: n/a
SAP IAS User group patch action is not working from Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are using the Identity directory API for the Patch action of the group. I have created the user using IAS action, wanted to move the user to specific Group. From Business accelerator Hub I am able to move the user to desired group, but from action group it is giving me error 400.

I am following the below steps:

  1. Login to SAP Build Process lobby, navigate to action section.
  2. Add the Identity provider API Action Project.
  3. Add the Group Patch Action to the project
  4. And execute the Patch action with provided input as Group Id 
  5. And operation as "xxxxx", path as "xxxxx" and value as "xxxxx"

    Attached screenshot for your reference:

     

    ERROR: 

Could you please help me or any suggestion to resolve this issue?

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: Mass download e-delivery document pdf output via DRC
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We're looking for an API for mass dowload e-delivery document pdf. Document and Reporting Compliance is used for e-processes and we need to display and print 20-50 e-delivery at one time, but system does not let. When we searched for similar scenerios, I faced with this billing process with same situation. However, I've checked the Business Accelerator Hub, I cannot find similar API for e-delivery. Could you please share your comments?

Thanks in advance for your support.

entry.title: Standard API ODATA v2 Class Data for Classification
entry.content:
Hello experts,

has anyone in this community ever implemented this API?  I kindly ask for your assistance. I'm facing an error when posting a request to create a class header, however I'm able to perform a get entity set to read the existing class headers.

API: https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_CLFN_CLASS_SRV/overview

I'm currently using a S4HANA on premise 2022 FPS01. I already tried the same API in a more recent system but unfortunately, I got the same error message.

 

URL Request:

(...)sap/opu/odata/SAP/API_CLFN_CLASS_SRV/A_ClfnClassForKeyDate   

 

HTTP Method:

Post

 

JSON:

{
   "ClassType": "300",
   "Class": "API_test1",
   "ClassStatus": "1",
   "ClassGroup": "",
   "ClassSearchAuthGrp": "",
   "ClassClassfctnAuthGrp": "",
   "ClassMaintAuthGrp": "",
   "DocNumber": "",
   "DocumentType": "",
   "DocumentPart": "",
   "DocumentVersion": "",
   "SameClassfctnReaction": "X",
   "ClassStandardOrgName": "",
   "ClassStandardNumber": "",
   "ClassStandardStartDate": null,
   "ClassStandardVersionStartDate": null,
   "ClassStandardVersion": "0",
   "ClassStandardCharcTable": "",
   "ClassIsLocal": true,
   "to_ClassCharacteristic": [
       {}
   ],
   "to_ClassDescription": [
       {
            "Language": "EN",
           "ClassDescription": "API_test1",
           "to_Class": {}          
       }
   ],
   "to_ClassKeyword": [
       {}
   ],
   "to_ClassText": [
       {}
   ]
}

 

Status:

405 Method Not Allowed

 

Error details:

"errordetails": [
               {
                "ContentID": "",
                 "code": "CX_SADL_ENTITY_CUD_DISABLED",
                 "message": "Creating operations are disabled for association '_CLASS', source entity 'API_CLFN_CLASS~A_CLFNCLASSDESCFORKEYDATE'",
                "propertyref": "",
                "severity": "error",
                "transition": false,
                "target": ""
               },
               {
                 "ContentID": "",                                           "code": "/IWBEP/CX_MGW_BUSI_EXCEPTION",                                                    "message": "An exception  was raised",
                "propertyref": "",
                "severity": "error",
                "transition": false,
                "target": ""
               }
           ]

Thank you,
Best Regards

entry.title: Post Material BOM | API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_V2 - odata v2
entry.content:
Hello experts,

has anyone in this community ever implemented This API? I kindly ask for your assistance.

API: https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_SRV_0002/overview

I want to create a material BOM without items but i couldn't do it, I have some error with my json body, fields are missing. I have looked at the documentation, specifically at the suggested JSON in the API Reference but I wasn't able to understand what is missing.

URL Request: (...)/sap/opu/odata/SAP/API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_SRV;v=0002/MaterialBOM

HTTP Method: Post

Request body - JSON:

{
    "BillOfMaterialVariantUsage": "1",
    "IsMultipleBOMAlt": false,
    "BillOfMaterialAuthsnGrp": "",
    "IsConfiguredMaterial": true,
    "BOMTechnicalType": "M",
    "BOMGroup": "",
    "BillOfMaterialStatus": "1",
    "IsMarkedForDeletion": false,
    "IsALE": false,
    "BOMHeaderBaseUnit": "PC",
    "BOMHeaderQuantityInBaseUnit": "2",
    "DocumentIsCreatedByCAD": false,
    "ProductDescription": "Super Bike",
    "PlantName": ""
}

Status: 400 Bad Request

Error details:

{
    "errordetails": [
        {
            "ContentID": "",
            "code": "29/853",
            "message": "Data is incomplete",
            "propertyref": "",
            "severity": "error",
            "transition": true,
            "target": ""
        }
    ]
}

 

Thank you,

Best Regards,

João Vieira

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Sandbox APIs not working
entry.content:
In SAP Business Accelerator Hub the SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Sanbox APIs are not working. Any idea how long these are not available? Is there any other chance to try out these APIs? E.g. how to get a trial environment of SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central? Thx

Details:
https://api.sap.com/api/ECEmploymentInformation/tryout

Request URL
https://sandbox.api.sap.com/successfactors/odata/v2/EmpEmployment?$top=20

Response Body
{ "code": "SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE", "message": "Sandbox Try Out is temporarily unavailable for SAP SuccessFactors APIs, regret the inconvenience." }

Response Headers
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: set-cookie, x-http-method
Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: false
Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, PUT, POST, DELETE, PATCH
Connection: keep-alive
Content-Length: 140
Access-Control-Max-Age: 3628800
Date: Wed, 17 Jul 2024 08:28:19 GMT
Access-Control-Allow-Headers: set-cookie, origin, accept, maxdataserviceversion, apikey, accept-language, x-http-method, content-type, X-Requested-With
Content-Type: application/json

entry.title: api Business Role - Read
entry.content:
Buenos días, alguien se ha conectado a la API Business Role - Read (Try Out | Rol de Negocio - Leer | SAP Business Accelerator Hub)? , tengo la duda porque cuando se hace la prueba incluso desde la página del hub de SAP Business Accelerator sale el error de autenticación, ¿tal vez alguien sabe cómo solucionarlo?

{
  "error": {
    "code": "/IWBEP/CM_V4_COS/011",
    "message": "No authorization to access service group 'APS_IAM_API_BROLE_READ'",
    "@SAP__common.ExceptionCategory": "Authorization_Error",
    "innererror": {
      "ErrorDetails": {
        "@SAP__common.Application": {
          "ComponentId": "BC-SRV-APS-IAM",
          "ServiceRepository": "SRVD_A2X",
          "ServiceId": "APS_IAM_API_BROLE_READ",
          "ServiceVersion": "0001"
        },
        "@SAP__common.TransactionId": "25669476CF940270E0066999F2D658D5",
        "@SAP__common.Timestamp": "20240719144729.364287",
        "@SAP__common.ErrorResolution": {
          "Analysis": "Use ADT feed reader \"SAP Gateway Error Log\" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details",
          "Note": "See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
I am very grateful if you can help me!

entry.title: SAP Business Accelerator Hub- service key
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
I'm trying to call the public api "integration content" from the Bussiness Accelerator Hub.
Currently I can perform both a GET and a POST with my personal user (S-User).
However, when I go to use a service key I receive this error

To create the service key I first created an instance of process integration runtime, plan api and then created the key.
When I set up the environment in the SAP Business accelerator hub I used the service key URL.
Do you have any suggestions on this?

Thank you all

entry.title: Accelerator Hub APIs in Japanese (!?)
entry.content:
I created a destination to:

https://sandbox.api.sap.com/s4hanacloud/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER

But when I try to create an Action in the SAP Build lobby they appear in Japanese.

entry.title: BTP Core API Entitlement not giving proper response and no api for fetching subscription of SA
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

i am using BTP core Entitlement API to fetch the entitlements of the subaccount and global account but the api are not returning the entitlement which are assigned to subaccount it is returning all the details and same is with the case of global account also , what i am missing here i am sending the request as per the documentation and created cloud management service central plan and triggering request from postman and all the below api has same results, also i cloud not found any api for gating active subscription of the subaccount ,please suggest all endpoints mentioned below returning same data:

1- Entitlements Service - /v1/assignments/?subaccountGUID=<saguid> &includeAutoManagedPlans=false&entitledServicesOnly=true

2- Entitlements Service - /v1/globalAccountAssignments

3- Entitlements Service - /v1/globalAccountAssignments/?subaccountGUID=<saguid> &includeAutoManagedPlans=false&entitledServicesOnly=true

Thanks,

Siddharth

SAP Business Technology Platform API

entry.title: Re: Could not get the ApiHub resource data
entry.content:
Hi,

I don't know if you have solved it yet, but I'm having the same issue and I wanted to share a way around this problem.

The solution consists on creating a Destination in SAP BTP and consuming the Business Accelerator Hub API through it in BAS.

1. Access Business Accelerator Hub and search for the API you want to consume. In my case, I'm using Sales Order (A2X) as a demo.

2. Once in the API page, scroll down in the Overview tab to the API resources. There, click on Configuration Details. We will be using the links provided there. In my case, I'll copy the sandbox URL.

3. Go to the Destination section of your SAP BTP subaccount. Here you have to creat a Destination for Business Accelerator Hub with the following configuration.

The property URL.headers.ApiKey will not appear as an option in the dropdown, you have to write it yourself. The value will be your Business Accelerator Hub Api key.

The URL will be "https://sandbox.api.sap.com" for sandbox.

4. We can now go to BAS and add the service in the Service Center. Instead of selecting the Business Accelerator Hub in the Provider selection, we will choose 'SAP SYSTEM'. There, our recently created destination will appear. If it doesn't show, refresh BAS.

 5. We select the apihub_sandbox service. In the Service Path Input, we have to copy the half of the API URL that we left behind when we created the Destination.

  • The part we used for the destination: https://sandbox.api.sap.com 
  • Our API URL: /s4hanacloud/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_salesorder/srvd_a2x/sap/salesorder/0001

After clicking on Connect, the Add to Project button should be displayed and the API content should appear below the Connect button. After that, we can add the service to our project.

 I hope that you find this useful.

Kind Regards

entry.title: How to obtain my S4HC APIKey
entry.content:
Hi

I started to write this question as I thought I needed the APIKey for a call to this API below.  I am still wanting to know that.

I want to update an element via the API_BUSINESS_PARTNER ... I have set up the comms arrangement sap_com_008 with basic authentication for this test.

According to the API Hub an APIKey is needed - that is in fact not true !!!.🙄 As I can call the API without it and it does the PATCH just fine.  But out of interest How can I get my SAP systems APIKey?🤔

In case you are interested in this part : Here is the API I am calling https://<my sap system>-api.s4hana.ondemand.com:443/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartner('9980000760').     This has in the Authorization tab my communication arrangements userid/password credentials.  The Headers have the CSRF token that I have obtained and it does not care about the APIKey.   The thing does post/patch just fine without it.

 

 

Here are the steps etc I took so far to obtain my APIKey

I have set a clientid/secret for OAUTH calls to S4HC API in our SAP IAS Application for our S4HANA Cloud- Test Tenant (i,e, the S4HC D5X system) and the Client Authentication attribute tab - The ClientID was already there and I have added a Secret.

I then attempt to obtain the APIKey via https://<mysapsystem>-api.s4hana.ondemand.com:443/oauth/token

but I get a 403 - so how can I get my dang APIKey ?

entry.title: How to obtain my S4HC APIKey
entry.content:
Hi

I started to write this question as I thought I needed the APIKey for a call to this API below.  I am still wanting to know that.

I want to update an element via the API_BUSINESS_PARTNER ... I have set up the comms arrangement sap_com_008 with basic authentication for this test.

According to the API Hub an APIKey is needed - that is in fact not true !!!.🤔

As I can call the API without it and it does the PATCH just fine.  But out of interest How can I get my SAP systems APIKey?🤔

In case you are interested in this part : Here is the API I am calling https://<my sap system>-api.s4hana.ondemand.com:443/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartner('9980000760').     This has in the Authorization tab my communication arrangements userid/password credentials.  The Headers have the CSRF token that I have obtained and it does not care about the APIKey.   The thing does post/patch just fine without it.

 

 

 

Here are the steps etc I took so far to obtain my APIKey

I have set a clientid/secret for OAUTH calls to S4HC API in our SAP IAS Application for our S4HANA Cloud- Test Tenant (i,e, the S4HC D5X system) and the Client Authentication attribute tab - The ClientID was already there and I have added a Secret.

 

 

I then attempt to obtain the APIKey via https://<mysapsystem>-api.s4hana.ondemand.com:443/oauth/token

but I get a 403 - so how can I get my dang APIKey ?

entry.title: Unable to update SAP APIM file resource using API Business Hub Enterprise APIs
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to update/create a file resource for an API in SAP APIM portal using the API BHE APIs.

I am able to retrieve the file resources for any particular API using the below URL:

GET https://<API tenant URL>/apiportal/api/1.0/Management.svc/APIProxies('<APIName>')/fileResources

However, while trying to create a new resource or update an existing one I am facing HTTP 403 (Forbidden error). I am not sure if the payload is incorrect or the method itself is not allowed, but I couldn't find any documentation for updating fileResources, policies or defaultFaultRules using the BHE APIs.

This is the payload I am using to update fileResources:

{"id":"<unique id of the resource>","name":"<Name of script>","scope":"APIPROXY","type":"js","content":"<javascript code>"}

I have already gone through this blog post - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/exploring-api-portal-and-api-business-hub-enterprise-apis-of-sap/ba-p/13540879

But there is no entry for fileResources. Any other documentation on this would be helpful too.

Thanks.

entry.title: Identity Directory API specification is broken
entry.content:
Hey there,

the Identity Directory API of the package SAP Cloud Identity Services is broken. When I try to use it with SAP Build Process Automation directly or also downloaded as JSON or YAML I get the following error:

Failed to fetch the artifact information: The API specification file is invalid. As the uploaded file specification format does not align with OpenAPI or CSDL specification standards.

In the browser it is working. Link: https://api.sap.com/api/IdDS_SCIM/overview
